_comment: Append-only floor for the Theorem-U anchor ledger (khipu/lutar_lean_receipts.ndjson). The chain only ever grows; verify-anchor-receipts.yml fails LOUDLY if either surface drops below this many receipts, so a wiped or truncated ledger can never pass green with 'nothing to check'. Raise this when a new receipt is anchored (chain_index N => min_receipts N).
